title: No Caps Lock
description: Disables caps lock so it can be used as a keybind only when on minecraft
body:
# HerosNotCapping - Anti Caps Lock

## What does it do?
Disables the normal Caps Lock behavior so you can use caps lock as a keybind safely

Specifically, the mod sends a second Caps Lock behind the scenes, either instantly or when no longer on the main Minecraft screen (based on configuration) - but doesn't send the second caps lock to the game

Makes it so you can freely use caps lock without worrying about having to turn it back off when trying to type

## Modes
Use the command:

`/herosnotcapping toggleMode`

Switches between two modes:

- **Instant Off Mode**  
  Caps Lock immediately toggles back off every time you press it

- **Gameplay-Only Mode**  
  Caps Lock stays active *only* during in-game play and automatically turns off when leaving gameplay
  *(Good for keyboards with Caps Lock LEDs that you don't want flashing constantly)*


## Compatibility
Realistically no server will disallow it, doesn't give any advantage, just a qol thing

Shouldn't realistically have any problems with any other mods.


## Contact
Any problems, questions, help: 
https://discord.gg/4ta7pM4bnr 
Let me know if there are any more incompatibilities in my discord!
